mapper.select: SELECT FROM admin_region r LEFT JOIN admin_region p ON p.region_id=r.parent_id WHERE r.region_code=#{code}

SELECT FROM admin_region r LEFT JOIN admin_region p ON p.region_id=r.parent_id AND p.region_code=#{parentCode}AND r.region_level=#{level}AND r.status=#{status}AND (LOWER(r.region_code) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')) OR LOWER(r.region_name) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')) OR LOWER(r.full_name) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))) ORDER BY r.region_level,r.sort_no,r.region_code
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_region SET region_name=#{value.regionName},parent_id=#{value.parentId},region_level=#{value.regionLevel},full_name=#{value.fullName},sort_no=#{value.sortNo},version=version+1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE region_code=#{value.regionCode} AND version=#{version}
UPDATE admin_region SET status=#{to},version=version+1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE region_code=#{code} AND status=#{from} AND version=#{version}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin_region WHERE parent_id=#{parentId} AND status='ENABLED'
